samples.user_query: Kids gymnastics programs near me
samples.assistant_text: Flips for Fun Gymnastics is the gymnastics spot in Havasu — they're at 955 Kiowa Ave and open 3pm–8pm Monday through Friday. Call (928) 566-8862 or check fffhavasu.com for their class schedule and age groups.

samples.user_query: Tell me about Bridge City Combat
samples.assistant_text: Bridge City Combat is a martial arts gym on McCulloch Boulevard run by Christian Beyers. They're open until 9pm, though the full weekly schedule isn't confirmed yet. You'll need to call (928) 716-3009 or stop by in person to book — they don't take reservations online. You can follow them on Instagram at instagram.com/bridgecitycombat for updates.

route_meta.entity: Bridge City Combat (also: Bridge City Combat & Barry Sullins Jiu-Jitsu)

samples.user_query: Events at Sara Park
samples.assistant_text:
Sara Park runs BMX and mountain bike programs year-round.

BMX happens most nights. Tuesday and Wednesday are practice and coaching ($5 each, 5pm start). Thursday is the sanctioned race night ($10, registration 6–7pm, racing 7pm; Oct–Jun schedule). One-off races also run on select dates like April 23, 28, and 30 (all $10, 6–7pm).

Mountain biking is free. Sunday morning dirt practice starts at 9am (more technical terrain). Monday evening practice runs 4:30–6pm through May. Both are Lake Havasu Mountain Bike Club sessions.

All programs welcome kids age 4–5 and up. Location is 7260 Sara Park Lane.

samples.user_query: BMX race times
samples.assistant_text:
BMX racing runs Thursday nights at SARA Park BMX Track — registration 6–7pm, racing starts at 7pm. It's $10 to race. The season runs October through June.

If you want to ride outside of race night, there's open practice Tuesday 5–6:30pm ($5) and coached training Wednesday 5–6:15pm ($5). Both are all skill levels.

Track's at 7260 Sara Park Lane. Call (928) 208-5388 for specifics on upcoming races or to register.

samples.user_query: Swimming lessons for beginners
samples.assistant_text: I've got Aqua Beginnings in the catalog — they run private heated outdoor pool lessons and you can book through their site at aquabeginnings.com. That's your beginner swim option here in Havasu.

samples.user_query: Dance classes for a 7-year-old
samples.assistant_text:
The rows here are recitals and showcases — end-of-year performances, not class enrollment. You're looking at ACPA Annual Dance Showcase (May 15–17, 2026) and Footlite School of Dance's recital (May 30 & June 1, 2026), both of which feature multiple styles like ballet, jazz, and tap that'd suit a 7-year-old.

To find actual classes for that age, you'll need to contact ACPA or Footlite directly — the catalog doesn't have their class schedules or registration info. A quick search for "dance classes Lake Havasu" or a call to the schools through the recital venues should get you started.

samples.user_query: My son wants to ride mountain bikes. Any classes available?
samples.assistant_text: The Lake Havasu Mountain Bike Club runs free practice sessions at Sara Park — your son's age fits perfectly. Sunday mornings 9–10:30am is the main slot, or Monday evenings 4:30–6pm if that works better. Call (619) 823-5088 to confirm he can drop in this weekend.

samples.user_query: Is there a curling club in Havasu?
samples.assistant_text: I'm not aware of a curling club in Havasu. If there is one, let me know — I'll pass it along.

samples.user_query: When is the hot air balloon festival?
samples.assistant_text: I don't have that event or program in the catalog yet. Add it at /contribute or share the name and a link (Google Business page or official site) — either works.

samples.user_query: Who teaches violin to adults?
samples.assistant_text: I'm not aware of a violin instructor in the catalog. If there's one in Havasu, let me know the name and a link — I'll add it.

samples.user_query: Underground techno tonight?
samples.assistant_text: I'm not aware of underground techno nights in Havasu — that's not in the catalog. If there's a venue running that, let me know and I'll pass it along.

samples.user_query: Sonics or Flips for fun for a shy 5-year-old?
samples.assistant_text: Flips for Fun is the better fit for a shy 5-year-old — they open at 3pm weekdays and the smaller class sizes tend to feel less overwhelming than Sonics' bigger team environment. Sonics runs cheer and competitive gymnastics, which skews older and louder; Flips focuses on recreational gymnastics fundamentals in a calmer setup. Call Flips at (928) 566-8862 to ask about their intro classes and what they offer for that age.

samples.user_query: Bridge City Combat vs Footlite School of Dance for Saturday morning kids classes?
samples.assistant_text:
I don't have Saturday morning class schedules for either Bridge City Combat or Footlite School of Dance in the catalog. Bridge City Combat's full weekly hours aren't confirmed, and Footlite's listed hours are Mon–Thu 3–7pm during dance year — neither shows a Saturday kids class slot.

Call Bridge City Combat at (928) 716-3009 or Footlite at (928) 854-4328 to ask what they offer Saturday mornings for a 5-year-old.

route_meta.entity: Bridge City Combat (also: Bridge City Combat & Barry Sullins Jiu-Jitsu)

samples.user_query: Which martial arts gym has Saturday morning kids classes?
samples.assistant_text: I don't have Saturday morning kids classes listed for the martial arts gyms in the catalog — Arevalo Academy and Bridge City Combat are both here, but their class schedules aren't filled in yet. Call Arevalo Academy at (928) 855-0505 or Bridge City Combat at (928) 716-3009 to ask about Saturday morning kids programs.

samples.user_query: Best place for toddler tumbling
samples.assistant_text: Flips for Fun Gymnastics is your best bet for toddler tumbling — they're set up for that age group and open weekday afternoons starting at 3pm. Call (928) 566-8862 to ask about their toddler classes and get on the schedule.

samples.user_query: Compare Footlite and Ballet Havasu for preschool dance
samples.assistant_text:
I don't have Footlite in the catalog — if there's a dance studio by that name in Havasu, let me know the website or Google Business page and I'll add it.

For Ballet Havasu, I've got the address and phone (2735 Maricopa Ave, 928-412-8208, ballethavasu.org), but I don't have their preschool class schedule or age breakdowns in the system yet. Call them directly to ask about what they offer for age 5 — that's the fastest way to compare.

samples.user_query: What's the best sushi in town?
samples.assistant_text: I'm not aware of sushi restaurants in the catalog right now. If there's one you've found or heard about, let me know the name and a link — I'll add it. You can also check https://www.golakehavasu.com/ or search "sushi Lake Havasu" to see what's open.

samples.user_query: Are home prices going down in Havasu?
samples.assistant_text: That's outside what I cover right now — I stick to things-to-do, local businesses, and events. Want me to point you to anything else?

samples.user_query: Weather this weekend?
samples.assistant_text: That's outside what I cover right now — I stick to things-to-do, local businesses, and events. Want me to point you to anything else?

samples.user_query: What should I do Saturday?
samples.assistant_text: Altitude's the pick for Saturday — it opens at 9am and runs until 9pm, so you've got the whole day to burn energy on the trampolines. A 90-minute open jump is $19, or go unlimited with a 120-minute session for $24.

samples.user_query: Pick one thing to do with kids this weekend
samples.assistant_text: Altitude's your pick for this weekend — 90-minute open jump is $19, and Saturday they're open 9am–9pm so you've got the whole day to burn energy. It's built for kids that age.
